description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 17th, a test vehicle operating in manual mode was traveling North-bound on Charles Road in Sunnyvale when the test vehicle's 
passenger-side mirror clipped the driver-side mirror of a parked Ford F-150, causing cosmetic damage to both mirror housings.  No injuries 
were reported and law enforcement was not called to the scene.
Print
Clear Form
